name: Payload Acceleration Profiling
description:
A robotics engineer in the semiconductor industry is programming a robot arm to transfer fragile silicon wafers. If the wafer experiences linear acceleration exceeding 15.0 m/s², it can slip or sustain micro-fractures. Simulate a rapid multi-joint movement (at least 3 joints) in CoppeliaSim using the ZMQ Remote API (port 23000) in stepping mode. Record the end-effector's kinematics and generate a safety certification report. Export the following files to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/:

payload_kinematics.csv: Time-series log with columns: time_s, pos_x, pos_y, pos_z, vel_x, vel_y, vel_z, accel_
